package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_profiling_benchmarking_optimization_comment_without_benchmark: Layer: Profiling and benchmarking. Flag performance-claim comments that lack benchmark, profile, or trace evidence.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule577PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario577Positive(records []Rule577PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
